summary: Plan-only classification for 40 open PRs. The shard is an inventory review, not a dedupe cluster, so no canonical was selected and no close, merge, label, comment, or fix action is planned. Non-security PRs are kept independent; #68180 is routed because its commit history contains explicit security-vulnerability wording.
